objective: Refactor trigonometric/transcendental shaders into responsibility subfolders while preserving shader asset declarations and catalog references. Topology: elementary_trig owns circular trig formulas and their Mandelbrot/Julia variants; hyperbolic owns sinh/cosh/tanh formulas and variants; exponential_iteration owns exp/superexp/tetration iteration formulas; special_functions owns zeta/eta/Jacobi/Mittag-Leffler/Weierstrass formulas. No subfolder imports UI/app orchestration; shader files remain pure GLSL assets exposed through pubspec and escape_time_catalog asset strings.
completedSlices: Added focused shader asset existence/declaration test for trigonometric_and_transcendental public behavior.
Moved all 35 root shader assets into responsibility subfolders and updated pubspec.yaml, escape_time_catalog.dart, and CPU formula comments to the new asset paths.
